stemHtml: During the loading of a cargo aircraft, you as Captain observe several packages marked “Packing Group III”. What does this indicate?

options.a: The packages contain three different types of dangerous goods.
options.b: The packages contain low-danger goods, subject to the least stringent packaging regulations.
options.c: The packages contain medium-danger goods, subject to more stringent packaging regulations.
options.d: The packages contain high-danger goods, subject to the most stringent packaging regulations.
